picks.title: SoFA Street Fair – Spring Edition
picks.why: SoFA Street Fair brings thousands for live music, art, food trucks, and a drag race—South Bay's best spring street party.

picks.title: Spring into Green 2026
picks.why: Los Gatos celebrates 10 years of Spring into Green with 20+ interactive sustainability booths and live entertainment.

picks.title: Free Admission on Nikkei Matsuri!
picks.venue: Japanese American Museum of San Jose
picks.why: Free museum admission during Nikkei Matsuri—rare chance to explore Japanese American history and culture in one visit.

picks.title: San Jose Japantown: From Bachelor Society to Family
picks.why: Documentarian Curt Fukuda reveals San Jose Japantown's hidden history from bachelor society to thriving families—local heritage few know.

picks.title: Vienna Teng
picks.why: Vienna Teng performs live at Montalvo Arts Center—beloved singer-songwriter rarely tours the Bay Area.
